pattern_text: The Nahuatl presented in this curriculum comes from the Huasteca region in
example_original: The Nahuatl presented in this curriculum comes from the Huasteca region in the state of Veracruz, Mexico, where one can find a municipality called Chicontepec (Figure 1 & 2). Various historical communities of Nahuatl-speaking peoples live in this region. In the same way that the Nahuatl language continues to be important for the municipality of Chicontepec, Nahua customs and traditions influence the lives of the people who live here. The objective of this material is to serve as a revitalization tool for Nahuatl language learning.

pattern_text: Nahuatl has not been fully standardized and until the present-day various groups
example_original: Nahuatl has not been fully standardized and until the present-day, various groups have developed their own style and variants of Nahuatl writing and teaching. While this online curriculum focuses on Nahuatl from the Huasteca area, we also introduce variants from the Mexican state of Hidalgo and Morelos. Some 1.5 million speakers of Nahuatl live in Mexico today.

pattern_text: HOW TO USE THE ONLINE CURRICULUM
example_original: HOW TO USE THE ONLINE CURRICULUM

pattern_text: Sabina Cruz de la Cruz ehua pan ce pilaltepetzin Tecomate Chicontepec Veracruz
example_original: Sabina Cruz de la Cruz , ehua pan ce pilaltepetzin Tecomate, Chicontepec; Veracruz, nahuatlahtoa. Momachtihqui pan caltlamachtiloyan tlen Universidad Autónoma de Zacatecas (UAZ), Momachtihqui tlen Derecho. Ce tlamachtihquetl tlen Educacion Historica pan caltlamachtiloyan tlen Centro de Actualización del Magisterio de Zacatecas. Tlamachtihquetl tlen nahuatl pan Departamento tlen Antropologia pan caltlamachtiloyan tlen Tulane, New Orleans, Louisiana, Estados Unidos. Tlamachtihquetl tlen nahuatl pan Departamento tlen “Teresa Lozano Long Institute of Latin American Studies and Collections” LLILAS Benson, pan caltlamchtiloyan tlen Texas, Austin, Estados Unidos. Tlamachtihquetl huan tlatemohquetl pan Instituto de Docencia e Investigación Etnológica de Zacatecas. (IDIEZ).

pattern_text: Catalina Cruz de la Cruz euhqui pan ce tonatiuh tlen Septiembre pan
example_original: Catalina Cruz de la Cruz , euhqui pan ce tonatiuh tlen Septiembre pan 1984 pan pilaltepetzin Tecomate, Chicontepec, tlatitlantoc Veracruz. Momachtih preescolar hasta la preparatoria pan pilaltepetzin Tecomate. Momachtih pan Caltlamachtiloyan tlen Zacatecas, Unidad Académica de Derecho. Nouhquiya tequitic quen tlamachtihquetl huan tlatehtemouhquetl pan Instituto de Docencia e Investigación Etnológica de Zacatecas (IDIEZ). Nouhquiya momachtih pan Unidad Académica de Docencia Superior, quipiya Maestría en investigaciones Humanísticas y Educativas.

pattern_text: For example the word teuctli lord sir is pronounced as tēktli emphasizing
example_original: For example, the word “teuctli” (lord/sir) is pronounced as “tēktli,” emphasizing the first vowel and silencing the “u.”

pattern_text: For example the word cōuhqui she bought something is pronounced as cōhquī
example_original: For example, the word “cōuhqui” (she bought something) is pronounced as “cōhquī,” emphazising the first vowel and silencing the “u.”

pattern_text: In this lesson we will learn Nahuatl greetings People in Nahua towns
example_original: In this lesson we will learn Nahuatl greetings. People in Nahua towns of Chicontepec, greet each other by hand and they do not look each other in the eyes, especially between a man and a woman. In general, adults do not say each other’s firsts names when greeting.

example_original: Mōztla īcā yāhuatzinco nimēhuaz, nitlacuāz huan nimopatlaz huanya nochocho. Teipan tiyāzceh caltlamachtihcān. Ne caltlamachtihcān tinehnemizceh huan timotlalozceh. Teipan nochocho huan na timocuapazceh īcā tiotlac huan timāltizceh tochān.

domain_label: Tlamachtiliztli 13 Tlachīhualiztli tlen quimānēxtia ācquiya quīchihua cē tlamantli (Verbs with specific object)

pattern_text: Nonanān tēchmāca cafen yāhuatzinco ticōnih huanya notatah quēmman titlamih notatah quicui īmacheteh
example_original: Nonanān tēchmāca cafen yāhuatzinco, ticōnih huanya notatah, quēmman titlamih notatah quicui īmacheteh, īmorral, ītzonecahuil, īāuh huan yohui mīllah. Notatah nehnemi cē cāhuitl huan ahci īmīllah huan pēhua tequiti cemilhuitl. Tohhuantin īconēhuan tiyohuih caltlamachtihcān, tlamachtianih tēchmachtiah caztiah tlahtolli. Nonanān mocāhua tochān pēhua tlachpāna, tlaxcalchīhua huan tlahcotōna yohui tēchtlamāca.
